description: Fix multiple issues in the Ngepet game: (1) After selecting a mystery box once, keep using that selectedHiddenItemId for subsequent guesses without requiring re-selection. (2) When the match ends (guessResult.isEnd == true or intruder status == 'end'), automatically redirect to LOBBY phase. (3) When a player joins a new match (joinMatch or checkActiveMatch), reset guessedItemNames to empty so previously greyed items are clickable again. (4) Show a candle animation when the intruder has already picked their hiding spot (hasPickedChoice == true). (5) Center all item images in all views (host items grid, intruder items grid, item selection dialogs, avatar shop, avatar collection).
steps: Step 1 - Fix mystery box re-selection: In NgepetViewModel.kt, modify intruderGuessHidden() to NOT reset selectedHiddenItemId after a wrong guess (only reset when isEnd==true or isCorrect==true - which is already done). Then modify the IntruderMatchView in NgepetGameScreen.kt: when selectedHiddenItemId is already set (not null), change the 'Tebak Token Host' button to directly open the item guess dialog (showGuessItemDialog=true) instead of showing the hidden item grid. Only show the hidden item grid if selectedHiddenItemId is null.

Step 2 - Auto-redirect to lobby on game end: In NgepetViewModel.kt, modify intruderGuessHidden() to detect when guessResult.isEnd==true and schedule navigation to LOBBY. Also in clearGuessResult(), after an isEnd==true result is dismissed, trigger goToPhase(LOBBY) and clear match state (currentMatchId=null, currentRole=null, etc). Similarly for the host: when closeMatch succeeds (already goes to LOBBY). Also add detection in refreshMatchDetail(): if the match status from server is 'closed' or current intruder status is 'end', transition to LOBBY.

Step 3 - Reset guessedItemNames on new match: In NgepetViewModel.kt, in joinMatch() (success handler) add guessedItemNames=emptySet(). In checkActiveMatch() (success handler) add guessedItemNames=emptySet(). This ensures when a player starts a new game, the greyed-out items from the previous game are cleared.

Step 4 - Candle animation when intruder has picked: In NgepetGameScreen.kt IntruderMatchView, in the 'hasPickedChoice' section (after 'Kamu sudah bersembunyi!' card), add a candle animation using Jetpack Compose animation. Use an InfiniteTransition with a flickering alpha animation (simulating candle flame). Display a candle emoji or icon with animated glow effect using Box with animating background gradient or shadow.

Step 5 - Center all item images: In NgepetGameScreen.kt, find all AsyncImage composables that display item images and ensure they use Alignment.Center within their parent Box/Column. Specifically: (a) In HostMatchView items grid, wrap AsyncImage in a Box with contentAlignment=Center. (b) In IntruderMatchView items grid (pick hiding spot), same treatment. (c) In ItemSelectionDialog, same. (d) In ItemSelectionDialogWithGreyed, same. (e) In AvatarShopTab, the AsyncImage already uses Alignment.CenterHorizontally on Column - ensure the image itself fills the allocated space properly with ContentScale.Fit instead of Crop to prevent cutting. (f) In AvatarCollectionTab, same - use ContentScale.Fit. (g) In LobbyMatchCard house avatar. (h) In HiddenItemGridDialog mystery box images.
acceptance_criteria: After selecting a mystery box, subsequent 'Tebak Token Host' clicks go directly to item selection dialog without showing mystery box grid again
When a game ends (isEnd==true), after dismissing the result dialog the user is automatically navigated back to LOBBY
When joining a new match, all items in the guess dialog are clickable (not greyed out from previous match)
A candle/flame animation is visible when intruder has already picked their hiding spot
All item images are visually centered in their containers across all views (host, intruder, dialogs, shop, collection)
verification: In NgepetViewModel.kt, verify selectedHiddenItemId persists across wrong guesses
In NgepetViewModel.kt, verify goToPhase(LOBBY) is called after game end
In NgepetViewModel.kt, verify guessedItemNames = emptySet() in joinMatch success and checkActiveMatch success
In NgepetGameScreen.kt, verify InfiniteTransition animation exists in hasPickedChoice section
In NgepetGameScreen.kt, verify all AsyncImage use ContentScale.Fit or are wrapped in centered Box
